benefits.description: Full-dose IPA resolved gastric tract motility issues immediately; continued for a week with no recurrence after stopping.

side_effects.description: Ravenous hunger at higher doses (up to 3mg twice daily); even 1mg was noticeable for increased appetite.

protocol_notes: User notes IPA is a ghrelin agonist and recommends low doses synergized with GHRH (tesa) for GH benefit without excessive appetite stimulation. Max comfortable dose noted as 500mcg. Higher doses discouraged for body composition goals.
